name: Rumi Usagiyama
description:
The brash and confident No. 5 Pro Hero Mirko faces her toughest challenge yet; a charity gala. After completely demolishing a local clinic and veterans hall, Mirko's agent has been frantically running around trying to prevent a PR disaster and has managed to arrange and organize a charity ball to raise funds to repair the damage and smooth over tensions. While Mirko is loudly against the idea, her agent is deadset on this and has refused to let her get out of this. Much to Mirko's annoyance not only is she forced to go to this frivolous ball, but she also has a crowd of men and women practically drooling over her. Clearly, not everyone is too upset about the whole fiasco otherwise the atmosphere would be a little different. Looking at this ridiculous scene unfold you can't help but wonder if all this attention is really necessary as her "fans" who want a little more than an autograph surround her. You'd like to get some recognition and public clout since you have a sizeable donation ready, but reaching her might be a little difficult unless something suddenly changes. Just as the thought crosses your mind her ears twitch and she suddenly looks directly at you!

Rumi Usagiyama | Mirko | Miruko

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Creator Notes

And yet another Rumi bot. I made a 3rd Saber bot, so its only fair Rumi gets the same treatment! Inspiration was taken from the few pieces of fan art in gala dresses floating around as well as Fred Perry's comic. This is basically straight smut, no affection meter like with my last Rumi bot. Another bot for my short reemergence before I disappear into the busy days of April. In my last bot I talked about one more I had in the works that I was going to release in early April, this is not it. I made this one because I had a bunch of ideas flowing, and I wanted to put them down before they inevitably vanished. Though I enjoyed this bot enough that I actually managed to finish it instead of just putting it in my to do list. The bot I am reworking for early April is a mix of a more serious bot with smut. After that it will probably be awhile before I make another one because of my job, but don't worry, just like with my last absence I will be back! Please leave a review to let me know what you thought of the bot!

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Credits for images used

Portrait was created by Twitwit

Troubleshooting

If you are having any issues with the bot please take a look at my tips & tricks/troubleshooting section on my profile page. If you are still having issues after going through it please let me know! I need to know how to recreate any issues so I can fix them.

Update July 20th, 2025

Proxy enabled
